uses.rightsBasisEvidence: Only factual quotient and dimension-one relationships are used. All explanations, datasets, examples, prompts, and assessments are original; no NIST expression, table, or image is reproduced.

agentAccess.notes: NIST rights and robots routes were checked before substantive public-page access; no source-specific agent restriction, login, paywall, or access-control barrier was found.
